title: Designing a Cyber Security Framework
scenario: Develop a cyber security framework for a large financial organization with multiple business units and departments. The framework must include policies, procedures, and guidelines for cyber security, data protection, and incident response. The output should be a comprehensive document in Word format.
constraints: Must use a clear and consistent formatting style throughout the document
Must include a detailed table with cyber security controls

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the framework have a clear logical structure and organization?
Does the framework adhere to the specified constraints?
Does the framework include cyber security best practices and standards?
Is the tone professional, concise, and free of errors?
